---
description: 'Guidelines for documenting code'
applyTo: '**/*.cs'
---

Use XML documentation comments for all interfaces and methods in interfaces, public classes and methods.
Use summary, param, and returns tags where appropriate.
Keep comments concise and focused on the "why" rather than the "how."
Update comments when code changes to keep them accurate.
Avoid obvious comments that do not add value.
Use consistent terminology and style in all comments.
